label: Content Slider
description: An image and content carousel with navigation arrows and dot indicators. Each slide has image, heading, description, and optional CTA link. Use for hero rotators, feature showcases, announcement banners. Layout: full-width slides with overlaid text, arrow navigation, dot pagination, auto-advance with pause on hover.
